arts.ttl: Salah transfer stance CONFIRMED by PSG boss: I love him!
arts.sum: PSG president Nasser Al-Khelaifi has confirmed his love for Liverpool attacker Mohamed Salah but says that he is not interested in signing the veteran. “I’m very proud of him and for what he’s done in the Premier League with Liverpool.

arts.sum: Napoli director Giovanni Manna provided an update on the ongoing negotiations at Napoli before his team was eliminated by Lazio in the Coppa Italia: “We’re in a work in progress because we changed a lot, including the coach."
